judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the canonical eye-exposure steps and order: rinse 15-20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes, continue rinsing, then call poison control or a doctor. The added do-not-stop-rinsing and escalation wording is grounded and field-usable.
